zh.lifeSummary: 當Captain Wallace Finlayson於1683年11月6日出生在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾艾比時，他的父親James Finlayson30歲，母親Margaret Wallace26歲。他於1715年11月3日與Frances Bennett在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆波斯姆斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1727年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾享年45歲，埋葬在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆波斯姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Captain Wallace Finlayson于1683年11月6日出生在英国苏格兰雷福福爾艾比时，他的父亲James Finlayson30岁，母亲Margaret Wallace26岁。他于1715年11月3日与Frances Bennett在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆波斯姆斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1727年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾享年45岁，埋葬在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆波斯姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Finlayson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: from the Gaelic personal name Fionnlagh (see Finley 1 and Finlay ) + -son. This is the Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic MacFhionnlaigh.

variants.name: Fenderson
meanings: Scottish: altered form of   Finlayson   or a variant of   Henderson  .

variants.name: Finley
meanings: Scottish and Irish: from the Gaelic personal name Fionnlagh (Old Irish Findlaech), from fionn ‘white, fair’ (see Finn ) + laoch ‘hero’, reinforced by an Old Norse name based on finn ‘Finn’ + leikr ‘fight’ or ‘hero’. The name is common in Ireland as well as Scotland.

English: habitational name from one or more lost, unidentified or altered placenames so named, such as Philleyholme, Dorset (recorded as Finelegh in 1280) derived from Old English fīna ‘wood-pecker’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Also a variant of Findlow, from Finlow Hill in Over Alderley, Cheshire (from Old English fīn ‘heap’ + hlāw ‘mound, hill’ meaning ‘heaped mound’).

nameMeanings.name: Wallace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin an ethnic byname from Old French waleis ‘foreign’, used by the Normans to denote members of various Celtic races in areas where they were in the minority: Welshmen in the Welsh marches, Bretons in East Anglia, and surviving Britons in the Strathclyde region. The given name seems to have been first used in Scotland, being bestowed in honour of the Scottish patriot William Wallace ( c.1270–1305 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Captain Wallace Finlayson was born on 6 November 1683, in Abbey, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, James Finlayson, was 30 and his mother, Margaret Wallace, was 26. He married Frances Bennett on 3 November 1715, in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1727, in New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 45, and was buried in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States.

fr.Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, B: Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Captain Wallace Finlayson est né le 6 novembre 1683, à Abbey, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Finlayson, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret Wallace, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Frances Bennett le 3 novembre 1715, à Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1727, à New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Captain Wallace Finlayson am 6. November 1683 in Abbey, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Finlayson 30 und seine Mutter Margaret Wallace 26. Er hat am 3. November 1715 in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America Frances Bennett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1727 im Alter von 45 Jahren in New Hampshire, British Colonial America und wurde in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Captain Wallace Finlayson è nato il il 6 novembre 1683 nel Abbey, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, James Finlayson, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Wallace, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Frances Bennett il 3 novembre 1715, nel Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1727, nel New Hampshire, British Colonial America, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.Abbey, Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland: イギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアアビー
ja.lifeSummary: Captain Wallace Finlaysonが1683年11月6日にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアアビーで生まれた時，父James Finlaysonは30歳，母Margaret Wallaceは26歳であった。1715年11月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムポルトスモウスでFrances Bennettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1727年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアで45歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムポルトスモウスにて埋葬された。

ko.Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 포츠모우스
ko.lifeSummary: Captain Wallace Finlayson(이)가 1683년 11월 6일 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 애브브이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Finlayson(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Wallace(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1715년 11월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 포츠모우스에서 Frances Bennett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1727년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 포츠모우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Captain Wallace Finlayson nasceu em 6 de novembro de 1683, em Abbey, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, James Finlayson, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Wallace, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Frances Bennett em 3 de novembro de 1715, em Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1727, em New Hampshire, British Colonial America, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Portsmouth, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, B: порцмоут, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Captain Wallace Finlayson родился 6 ноября 1683 г. в местности эбби, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени James Finlayson было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Wallace, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Frances Bennett 3 ноября 1715 г. в местности порцмоут, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1727 г. в местности ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности порцмоут, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты.

Se casó con Frances Bennett el 3 de noviembre de 1715, en Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1727, en New Hampshire, British Colonial America, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Portsmouth, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos.
